motion_system: slow ripple logic: tiny glyphs, insect marks, and water rings drift outward from the central glow, then settle back into the habitat field
color_drift: tea cream and ochre fade into moss green, water gray, tobacco brown, and deep charcoal with occasional dim amber pulses
glow_behavior: one restrained lantern glow, a few soft CRT specks, and faint paper-edge backlight, never neon
